core_philosophy: Serene, premium, emotionally reinforcing. A sanctuary from digital noise. Fusing spiritual mindfulness with clean, modern utility.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-medium
scales.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-medium

typography.rules: Never use Inter or generic sans for headings. Use letter-spacing strictly as defined. Limit H1 usage. Center align headings only in ritual or hero contexts, left align elsewhere for readability.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Utilize 2-3x typical padding. Tension through asymmetry in marketing, clean structured grids in dashboards.

grid_strategy.dashboard: MODE B: The Control Room Grid, optimized for calm. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6.
grid_strategy.marketing: MODE A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetrical, overlapping content with plenty of negative space.

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl for main containers, rounded-xl for inner elements to maintain softness.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background (surface), 1px subtle border (#E6E2D8), no shadow default. Hover: shadow-sm border-[#D4A373]/30 transition-all duration-300.
surfaces.ritual_mode: Completely distraction-free. Solid background of #FDFBF7. Hide main navigation. Use large serif typography with plenty of vertical breathing room.
surfaces.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80, with a delicate 1px inner stroke border-b border-[#E6E2D8]/50.

motion.philosophy: Calm, slow, and intentional. No bouncy spring animations.
motion.interactions: Hover states must have slightly lifted (-translate-y-1) elements and deepen text color.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#879C93] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3, subtle hover effect. Secondary: border border-[#E6E2D8] text-[#2C3531] rounded-full px-6 py-2. Never use standard rectangular buttons.
components.inputs: Shadcn overrides: Soft rounded-xl or rounded-full with subtle background (#F3F0EA), border-transparent focus:border-[#879C93] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#879C93]/30.
components.cards: Minimalist cardless or subtle bento-box style. Avoid cluttered card headers.
components.navigation: Bottom nav for mobile (fixed, glassmorphism), Top nav for desktop.

logo_and_brand.description: Use as splash screen, login page hero anchor, or premium visual element in the upgrade modal.

icons.usage: Use 'Lotus.svg' and 'Mindfulness.svg' for dashboard snapshot. 'Candle.svg' or 'Water.svg' for evening/morning rituals. 'Calendar.svg' for streaks. 'Book.svg' for journaling/3-6-9 history. 'Hamsa.svg' or 'Ajna.svg' for premium subscription icons.

illustrations.usage: Use as heroes for empty states (e.g., no goals yet), onboarding success, and subscription paywall highlights.

external_images.usage: Use for the premium subscription upgrade page background or ambient texture on the login view.
Use as a full-bleed background for the immersive evening 9x ritual session, set with a bg-black/20 overlay.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for normal text. Avoid light gray text on white.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements, forms, links, and buttons MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='ritual-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for all animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React frontend (.js/.jsx extensions).
Prioritize mobile-first design with a bottom navigation bar for mobile viewports, adhering strictly to the bottom-nav paradigm for core routes.
The 3-6-9 ritual screen must be an immersive and distraction-free writing experience. Use soft typography and strip away all unrelated UI components.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override them via Tailwind to remove the default 'Vercel' tech look, shifting them strictly to the Organic & Earthy theme.
Font requirement: Add Cormorant Garamond (headings) and Outfit (body) via Google Fonts. Do not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.
Integrate the provided SVGs dynamically. The Streak feature should uniquely utilize icons like 'Candle.svg' or 'Lotus.svg' to visually represent progress.
Do not invent new arbitrary color schemes. Strictly use the defined colors (Sage green primary, Sand background).
Only implement in-app reminders as requested, omitting email notifications.
Implement Google OAuth login as the primary entry point.
Goal limits are tied to subscription tiers (Free: 1, Paid: 3-10). Ensure the UI gracefully handles these limits with an upsell to the premium plans.
Ensure every page and component has proper data-testid attributes for testing.
